action.reasoning: Observation: CNN error - the SB3 CnnPolicy is treating obs as (B,C,H,W) directly via VecTransposeImage, but my forward does its own permute, leading to 7x7 -> wrong axis. Actually SB3's CnnPolicy auto-transposes channel-last to channel-first, so observations passed to my forward are already (B, C, H, W) = (B, 3, 7, 7). My permute then produces (B, 7, 3, 7) which breaks. Decision: Remove the permute in forward (SB3 auto-transposes), and don't permute in the dummy sample either - use the transposed shape. Simplest fix: skip permute, just convert to float.
